message:
fix(conformance): allow extended tool descriptions and extra properties

After Search V3, the Rust search_messages tool has enhanced descriptions
(parameter docs, ranking options, examples) and additional schema
properties (filters, explain, ranking) beyond the Python baseline. Update
parity tests to:

- Allow Rust descriptions that extend the Python baseline (prefix match
  on first 200 chars)
- Only fail on missing schema properties (backwards compat), not extra
  ones (forwards compat)

All 39 conformance tests now pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
